classes.name: pypaimon.api.table_commit.BatchTableCommit

methods.name: pypaimon.api.table_commit.BatchTableCommit.commit
documentation:
Commit the commit messages to generate snapshots. One commit may generate
up to two snapshots, one for adding new files and the other for compaction.

methods.name: pypaimon.api.table_commit.BatchTableCommit.close
documentation: Close this resource.
A table commit for batch processing. Recommended for one-time committing.

classes.name: pypaimon.api.write_builder.BatchWriteBuilder

methods.name: pypaimon.api.write_builder.BatchWriteBuilder.overwrite
documentation:
Overwrite writing, same as the 'INSERT OVERWRITE T PARTITION (...)' semantics of SQL.
If you pass None, it means OVERWRITE whole table.

documentation: Create a BatchTableWrite to perform batch writing.

methods.name: pypaimon.api.write_builder.BatchWriteBuilder.new_commit

classes.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.Predicate
documentation:
Predicate which evaluates to a boolean. Now it doesn't have
any methods because only paimon_python_java implement it and
the Java implementation convert it to Java object.

classes.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.equal
documentation: field = literal

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.not_equal
documentation: field <> literal

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.less_than
documentation: field < literal

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.less_or_equal
documentation: field <= literal

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.greater_than
documentation: field > literal

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.greater_or_equal
documentation: field >= literal

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.is_null
documentation: field IS NULL

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.is_not_null
documentation: field IS NOT NULL

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.startswith
documentation: field.startswith

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.endswith
documentation: field.endswith()

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.contains
documentation: literal in field

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.is_in
documentation: field IN literals

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.is_not_in
documentation: field NOT IN literals

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.between
documentation: field BETWEEN included_lower_bound AND included_upper_bound

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.and_predicates
documentation: predicate1 AND predicate2 AND ...

methods.name: pypaimon.api.predicate.PredicateBuilder.or_predicates
documentation: predicate1 OR predicate2 OR ...
A utility class to create Predicate object for common filter conditions.
